//: Editor-only config for electron/*.ts (the build uses ../tsconfig.electron.json; nothing references this file). module=preserve + moduleResolution=bundler matches how the electron main process is actually built (bundled by vite) and is accepted by both the project's TS 5.8 and VS Code's newer bundled TS — the previous moduleResolution=node was flagged as deprecated by the editor's TS 6/7 track.
